reviews.comment:
Si bien esta ubicada en una esquina,es poco el lugar para aguardar la atención de los playeros,ya q el tercer vehículo queda en la vereda-calle, obstruyendo el paso de transeúntes. Excelente y gentil atención del personal.

(Translated by Google)
Although it's located on a corner, there's little room to wait for beachgoers, as the third vehicle is parked on the sidewalk, blocking pedestrians. The staff is excellent and courteous.
